response.overview: How to⭐1-[870].768.0250  Unfreeze Your DeFi Wallet Account⭐1-[870].768.0250 A frozen DeFi Wallet account can be stressful  ⭐1-[870].768.0250 . Usually, this happens due to security alerts, unusual activity, or incomplete verification ⭐1-[870].768.0250 . The good news? You can regain access quickly by following the right steps ⭐1-[870].768.0250 . Step 1: Check Your Email Notifications  DeFi Wallet typically sends an alert explaining why your account was frozen ⭐1-[870].768.0250 . Make sure you⭐1-[870].768.0250  check the inbox tied to your account for instructions ⭐1-[870].768.0250 . Step 2: Complete Verification ⭐1-[870].768.0250 Most freezes are triggered by missing or outdated KYC documents. Upload a valid ID, proof of address, and any requested documents .
